article_meta.title: Family Welcome To The Future, Where AI Grandma Raises The Kid You Bought From The Baby Bank By: Elle Purnell November 19

reasoning: Correctly classified as Right with well-calibrated confidence and mostly author-prose evidence. Minor failures: cites a quoted tagline ('Freeze your eggs, free your career') and the outlet identity as indicators (attribution/external-source violations), and the response was wrapped in a markdown code block (format violation).

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Article is clearly Right: explicit religious natural-law framing, defense of traditional family, critiques of IVF/surrogacy/transgenderism/feminism in the author’s own prose.
